Youth Growth Grant

Grant funding for youth-owned startups. Qualifying businesses can receive up to R250 000 for equipment, working capital, and market access. Applications are submitted online.

Learn more Apply now

Asset Finance Loan

Asset finance loan for machinery and productive equipment purchases. Loans are available from R500 000 to R5 million with repayment terms up to 60 months.

View facility

Expansion Equity Facility

Equity investment facility for established SMEs expanding into new markets. Funding supports growth capital, job creation, and commercialisation.

View equity facility
